title: 'ISIS', 'Jihad', 'Gaza': Maharashtra ATS Recovers Chilling 'Lone Wolf' Note From Mira Road Attacker’s House
description: When police searched Ansari's home after his arrest, the investigation team found handwritten notes in which he expressed his desire to join ISIS. According to sources, in these notes, the accused described the attack as his "first step" towards joining a terrorist organisation.
